entry.data:
CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 70
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS AROUND 70
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
